summary: Create or update PhoneBio Field Biology Worker assistant using vapi/assistant.field-biology-worker.json after confirming Vapi API key and target phone number.
Publish clean PhoneBio repo after local verification and secret scan.
Create protocol/safety/hardware schema only if hackathon backend persistence is required.
Not part of the current funded/API path; do not add an inference adapter unless a separate approved credit source exists.
Run make wire after VAPI_API_KEY/VAPI_PHONE_NUMBER_ID/VAPI_WEBHOOK_URL/VAPI_CUSTOM_LLM_URL are available, then verify inbound call.
Refresh Ollarma selection and restore Watchtower bridge aggregator before using Ollarma as a strict PhoneBio work lane.
Deploy FastAPI app through Docker/Procfile or Vapi CLI tunnel, then set VAPI_WEBHOOK_URL for live assistant creation.
